mechanical.back_face: fully flush flat back, no camera bump, no protruding lens ring
mechanical.mass_target_note: 185 g is the original aspirational concept target; 168 +/-10 g (158-178 g window) is the EVT0 ship target. Swell/camera/seal + Wave-2 rev (12.7 mm device for the 0.6 mm battery swell void + healthier camera burial, 5.6 mm/5727 mAh battery, 10 screw bosses, 4 corner ribs, glass cushions, RF tuner, flash LED) reconciles to 172.85 g (164.45 g CAD geometry across 118 parts + 8.4 g assembly-stage reserve), still inside the ship-target window. Ship target unchanged. The +0.9 mm device depth adds taller side-wall plastic but the dominant mass remains the battery (82.63 g) and screen stack (39.03 g).

compute.soc_class: Rockchip RK3566 (quad Cortex-A55, Mali-G52, 1 TOPS NPU)
compute.sourcing_note: Compute is sourced as a turnkey RK3566 SoM bundling SoC + LPDDR4 + eMMC + PMIC behind a public 260-pin SODIMM pinout (PATH A, buildable today). A bare-SoC cost-down path (bare Unisoc T606/RK3566 + discrete LPDDR4/eMMC/PMIC, PATH B) is ~$4.55-7.10/unit cheaper but needs the SoC vendor NDA for the BGA ball-map.

cellular.antenna_aperture_tuner: Qorvo QPC1252Q (pSemi PE613050 alt), MIPI RFFE v2.1 aperture/band-switch tuner
cellular.note: 5G RedCap (NR-Light); LTE fallback per module datasheet. Cellular low band (700-960 MHz) is covered via a modem-programmed aperture/band-switch tuner that retunes the electrically-small low-band element per active ~20 MHz carrier, resolving the Chu-limit instantaneous-bandwidth shortfall (analytical RF pre-scan verdict PASS_WITH_TUNER, worst-state total efficiency ~-3.1 dB; not chamber-measured).

battery.candidate: LiPol LP566487 class 3.85 V 5727 mAh 22.05 Wh thick pouch

camera.rear_flash: single rear torch/flash LED (Everlight/OSRAM-class ~1.0x1.0 mm) behind a flush light-pipe window, AW36515-class flash driver

environmental.ip_rating_reasoning: USB-C perimeter gasket + drip-break lip + drain shelf, labyrinth-sealed side buttons with elastomer gaskets, perimeter cover-glass adhesive bond, port mesh on acoustic openings. Sufficient for IP54 design intent; IP67 not claimed (no pressure-tested chassis seal).

evidence_note: All values are CAD-derived for EVT planning. No measured hardware. Mass, IP rating, and drop figures are design targets and require EVT/DVT verification.
